name: Potato Candy 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash the potatoes.
2. Add 1 cup of sugar, all of the coconut, and the flavoring (or your choice) to the mashed potatoes. Mix until a thick mass is formed.
3. Transfer the mixture into a buttered pan.
4. Melt the chocolate and pour it over the potato mixture.
5. Allow the mixture to set but not hard completely.
6. Cut into squares.
I recommend using peppermint flavoring, as it tastes like a Peppermint Patty.
